title: Nexus's Doctor Who client Mod Remake
description:
A remake of Doctor Who Client Mod.

It adds well Doctor Who into Minecraft!

In the mod you can get a T.A.R.D.I.S, daleks, cybermen, and sonic screwdrivers!
body:
Due to IKingSGC being gone. I thought to myself "What if I had a shot at remaking it?" And here it is!

![DWCM Remake Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dbd387d99eb67d3e1375c23776cf974d9513340.png)

**CURRENTLY ADDS**

The TARDIS (You need a broken TARDIS key and TARDIS reactivator)![The OG exterior from the mod.]

Remember Doctor Who Client Mod This is it now feel old yet

Daleks (19 varients)

Cybermen (9 varients)

Dalek Anium

Steel

Roundels

TARDIS blocks

sonic screwdrivers

And Planets!

I would reccomend using JEI to see the recipies
